name: MessageArchive
short: Save all guild messages to local archive files.
description: Stores each guild message in a local SQLite database for retention and recovery workflows.
author: itsneufox
install_msg: MessageArchive loaded. Use [p]messagearchive on/off and [p]messagearchive status. Use [p]messagearchive backfill to import existing channel history.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores raw message content, author IDs, channel IDs, timestamps, and message metadata in a local SQLite file. This can include text, references, and attachments links. Guild administrators can disable or clear archives at any time with [p]messagearchive off and [p]messagearchive clear.
